content:
MODULE: cosmos.network.cosmos_v2_test
FILE: cosmos/network/cosmos_v2_test.py (344 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS v2.0 Integration Test
==============================

Tests all four new subsystems:
  1. Latent Space Routing — auto-route by semantic intent
  2. Proof-of-Inference — consensus verification
  3. GPU-Signed Model Attestation — verify running models
  4. Swarm Memory Crystallization — propose

CLASSES:
- V2TestClient: Test client for COSMOS v2.0 features.
  Methods: async def connect(self, compute_gpu: bool=False) -> bool
  Methods: async def test_latent_route(self, prompt: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def test_standard_route(self, bot_name: str, prompt: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def test_poi_request(self, prompt: str, model: str) -> None
  Methods: async def close(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def test_latent_router_standalone()
- async def main()

INTERNAL DEPS: cosmos_protocol, cosmos_latent_router, cosmos_auth
